"It 3-5/2006-4. 54k*tki •'Fqt;119' <b<tct,1,4?iwr tiPaq MINISTRYOF WOMEN AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th April, 2007 S.O. 535(E).—In pursuance of Section 3(2)(b) of the Commissions for Protection of Child Rights Act, 2005 (4 of 2006), the Central Government hereby nominates the following as the Members of the National Commission for Protection of Child Rights !— 1. Ms. Dipa Dixit, D-41, Pompash Enclave, Near Greater Kailash, New Delhi-48 in the field of laws relating to children; and 2. Smt, Sandhya Bajaj, House No. 709, Sector 16-A, Faridabad, Haryana in the field oftenile justice or care of neglected or marginalized children or children with disabilities. Ms. Dipa Dixit and Smt. Sandhya Bajaj shall hold office for a period of three years from 10th April, 2007, or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F.
